zh.Harringworth,Northampton,England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche於1341年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯時，他的父親Sir William la Zouche20歲，母親Elizabeth de Ros22歲。他於1351年與Lady Agnes de Grene在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年5月4日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年55歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche于1341年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯时，他的父亲Sir William la Zouche20岁，母亲Elizabeth de Ros22岁。他于1351年与Lady Agnes de Grene在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1396年5月4日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年55岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche was born in 1341, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir William la Zouche, was 20 and his mother, Elizabeth de Ros, was 22. He married Lady Agnes de Grene in 1351, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 4 May 1396, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche est né en 1341, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William la Zouche, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Ros, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes de Grene en 1351, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1396, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche 1341 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William la Zouche 20 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Ros 22. Er hat 1351 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England Lady Agnes de Grene geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Mai 1396 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche è nato il nel 1341 nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William la Zouche, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Ros, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Agnes de Grene nel 1351, nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 maggio 1396, nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zoucheが1341年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir William la Zoucheは20歳，母Elizabeth de Rosは22歳であった。1351年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスでLady Agnes de Greneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1396年5月4日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで55歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche(이)가 1341년 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William la Zouche(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Ros(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1351년 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 Lady Agnes de Grene(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 5월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche nasceu em 1341, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William la Zouche, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Ros, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes de Grene em 1351, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de maio de 1396, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche родился в 1341 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William la Zouche было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Ros, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes de Grene в 1351 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 4 мая 1396 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche nació en 1341, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William la Zouche, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Ros, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Agnes de Grene en 1351, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1396, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
